tweet_text: 🚨 UEFA has rejected the Premier League's request for 28-man Champions League squads after backlash from Spanish clubs like Atlético Madrid. English teams will stick to the current squad limit! ⚽️❌ #ChampionsLeague #FootballNews
article_title: English clubs’ plea for bigger Champions League squads rejected after Spanish backlash

tweet_text: 🚨 Manchester United's wonderkid Bendito Mantato, compared to Bukayo Saka, is set to miss the rest of the season due to a serious ankle injury suffered in U21 action. 😢 #MUFC #YouthTalent
article_title: Man Utd wonderkid billed as 'next Bukayo Saka' suffers huge injury blow
